ddls:
CREATE TABLE "roll_calls" (
  "roll_call_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roll call vote */,
  "chamber" TEXT /* Legislative chamber where the vote took place (e.g., H, S) */,
  "desc" TEXT /* Description of the vote */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the vote */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill associated with the vote */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legislative session */,
  "votes_for" INTEGER /* Number of votes in favor */,
  "votes_against" INTEGER /* Number of votes against */,
  "abstentions" INTEGER /* Number of abstentions */,
  "absent" INTEGER /* Number of absentees */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of roll call (e.g., final vote, preliminary vote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roll_call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roll_calls_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the bill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bill */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of bill (e.g., education, transportation) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bill (e.g., pending, passed, failed) */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legislative session */,
  "introduced_by" TEXT /* Legislator who introduced the bill */,
  "introduced_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was introduced */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last date the bill was updated */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the bill becomes effective if passed */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the bill */,
  "full_text" TEXT /* Full text of the bill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_introduced_by FOREIGN KEY ("introduced_by") REFERENCES legislators ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislators" (
  "legislator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the legislator */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the legislator (e.g., Democrat, Republican) */,
  "chamber" TEXT /* Legislative chamber where the legislator serves (e.g., H, S) */,
  "district" TEXT /* District represented by the legislator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the legislator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the legislator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the legislator */,
  "term_start" TEXT /* Start date of the legislator's term */,
  "term_end" TEXT /* End date of the legislator's term */,
  "committee" TEXT /* Committee(s) the legislator serves on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legislator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "roll_call_id" INTEGER /* ID of the roll call vote associated with the vote */,
  "legislator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legislator who cast the vote */,
  "vote" TEXT /* Vote cast by the legislator (e.g., yea, nay, absent) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the vote (e.g., personal, party line) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_roll_call_id FOREIGN KEY ("roll_call_id") REFERENCES roll_calls ("roll_call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_legislator_id FOREIGN KEY ("legislator_id") REFERENCES legislators ("legislator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chambers" (
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislative chamber */,
  "chamber_name" TEXT /* Name of the legislative chamber (e.g., House, Senate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the legislative chamber */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legislative session */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Brief description of the chamber's rules and procedures */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chamber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill version */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill associated with the version */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the bill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_versions_author FOREIGN KEY ("author") REFERENCES legislators ("name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_versions_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., legislator, staff, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each roll call vote
